name: Investment Research
description_en: Four-masters integrated value-investing research framework: business quality, moat, management, risks, industry trends, and valuation.
description_zh: 四大师综合价值投资研究框架：生意质量、护城河、管理层、风险、行业趋势与估值。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It runs a structured research workflow blending Buffett, Munger, Duan Yongping, and Li Lu's methodologies, ending with a decisive investment memo and price-range guidance.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。运行融合巴菲特、芒格、段永平、李录方法论的结构化研究流程，最终输出明确的投资备忘录与价格区间建议。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from tools/ and performs web searches for financial data. No external accounts required; verify all figures before investing.
sec_note_zh: 会运行 tools/ 下的本地 Python 工具，并执行网络搜索获取财务数据。无需外部账号；投资前请核实所有数字。
